Surgeries

  • Tweet

Greg holds regular help and advice surgeries around the constituency. See below the list of surgeries taking place throughout 2026 across Mid Buckinghamshire:

  • 15th May - Stokenchurch
  • 19th June - Brill
  • 17th July - Prestwood
  • 21st August - East Claydon
  • 18th September - Naphill
  • 20th November - Waddesdon
  • 18th December - Princes Risborough

To book an appointment please email: [email protected] or call 020 7219 4287.

Greg also holds a series of less formal "pint of view" pub surgeries for local residents to let him know what's on their minds.

Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
